channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: John Cameron Mitchell Screening Hedwig and the Angry Inch Across North America for 25th Anniversary
item.description: 🎸 Hedwig hits the road! John Cameron Mitchell celebrates 25 years of rock 'n' roll magic with special screenings. Who's joining the party? 🎥🌟 #Hedwig25 #RockOn

item.title: Whitmer Thomas Shares New Song “Candy Corn” With Video Starring Joe Pera & Carmen Christopher
item.description: 🎶 Dive into the sweet world of "Candy Corn" with Whitmer Thomas, Joe Pera, & Carmen Christopher! 🍭🌽 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Vegas emo band The Ritornello Form release debut album ‘Majority Rule,’ announce tour
item.description: 🎸 Feel the emo vibes! 🖤 The Ritornello Form drops 'Majority Rule' album and hits the road on tour! 🚌🎶 #EmoRockRevolution

item.title: The Mystery Lights brought some rock back to CBGB
item.description: 🎸 Rock 'n' roll revival alert! The Mystery Lights electrified CBGB with their killer sound! 🤘 #RockOn #MusicRebirth

item.title: Rosalía Shares Tour Essay, Delights Ween Fans, Gets Shoutout From Mick Jagger
item.description: 🎤🌟 Rosalía's tour essay has us all feeling the love! Ween fans are in for a treat, and even Mick Jagger approves! 🎶💃 #MusicNews #Rosalía #Ween #MickJagger
